candidates.why: Explicit D&A line within cost of revenues, but it appears as a component under the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of Operating Revenue' / 'Cost of Revenues - Other - Total') rather than a separate same-level operating expense to add later.
Explicit D&A line within cost of revenues, but it appears to be embedded within the selected COGS bucket hierarchy and therefore should not be added separately to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket already uses main cost-of-revenue rows. The visible cost-of-revenue D&A lines look like sub-components of that bucket, not separate add-on rows.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the SG&A D&A candidate, but it appears as a component line within 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total' and is not a separate same-level expense to add later; it is also blank in the preview.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A amortization line, but it appears to be a sub-component of the already selected 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total' bucket, so adding it separately would likely double count.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket already includes 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. The SG&A D&A rows shown appear nested within that parent row, so no separate D&A add-back row should be selected.
